holdings.infoBox: MRNY is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax MRNA Option Income Strategy ETF (MRNY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Moderna stock (MRNA) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. MRNY was launched on Oct 23, 2023 and is issued by YieldMax.
